2026-05-23

R Markdown

library(aTSA)
## 
## Attaching package: 'aTSA'
## The following object is masked from 'package:graphics':
## 
##     identify
library(forecast)
## 
## Attaching package: 'forecast'
## The following object is masked from 'package:aTSA':
## 
##     forecast
library(tseries)
## Registered S3 method overwritten by 'quantmod':
##   method            from
##   as.zoo.data.frame zoo
## 
## Attaching package: 'tseries'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:aTSA':
## 
##     adf.test, kpss.test, pp.test
birth <- c(
  # 第1列（1750-1774）
  9,12,8,12,10,10,8,2,0,7,10,9,4,1,7,5,8,9,5,5,6,4,-9,-27,12,
  # 第2列（1775-1799）
  10,10,8,8,9,14,7,4,1,1,2,6,7,7,-2,-1,7,12,10,10,4,9,10,9,5,
  # 第3列（1800-1824）
  4,3,7,7,6,8,3,4,-5,-14,1,6,3,2,6,1,13,10,10,6,9,10,13,16,14,
  # 第4列（1825-1849）
  16,12,8,7,6,9,4,7,12,8,14,11,5,5,5,10,11,11,9,12,13,8,6,10,13
)
# 生成年份 1750 ~ 1849
years <- 1750:1849
plot(years,birth,
     type = "l",        # 折线
     lwd = 3,           # 线条粗细
     col = "#2E86AB",   # 颜色
     main = "1750-1849年出生率时序图",
     xlab = "year",
     ylab = "birth",
     panel.first = grid())
# 加上数据点
points(years, birth, pch=19, col="darkred")

# 运行ADF检验
adf_result <- adf.test(birth) 
print(adf_result) 
## 
##  Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test
## 
## data:  birth
## Dickey-Fuller = -3.8819, Lag order = 4, p-value = 0.01774
## alternative hypothesis: stationary
# 安全判断（避免p.value为空报错）
if (!is.null(adf_result$p.value) && adf_result$p.value < 0.05) {
  cat("\n结论：序列平稳\n")
} else {
  cat("\n结论：序列非平稳，需要差分处理\n")
}
## 
## 结论：序列平稳
# 查看自相关/偏自相关图，定阶
par(mfrow = c(1,2))
acf(birth, main = "ACF图")
pacf(birth, main = "PACF图")

par(mfrow = c(1,1))

#拟合AR(1)模型（对比）
ar1_model <- arima(birth, order = c(1, 0, 0))
# 查看AR(1)模型详细结果
summary(ar1_model)
## 
## Call:
## arima(x = birth, order = c(1, 0, 0))
## 
## Coefficients:
##          ar1  intercept
##       0.4616     6.7627
## s.e.  0.0885     0.9550
## 
## sigma^2 estimated as 26.88:  log likelihood = -306.58,  aic = 619.15
## 
## Training set error measures:
##                       ME     RMSE      MAE  MPE MAPE      MASE       ACF1
## Training set -0.01286411 5.184284 3.401835 -Inf  Inf 0.9053269 0.05001973
# 检验AR(1)残差是否为白噪声
Box.test(ar1_model$residuals, type = "Ljung-Box", lag = 12)
## 
##  Box-Ljung test
## 
## data:  ar1_model$residuals
## X-squared = 6.1098, df = 12, p-value = 0.9104
birth_ts <- ts(birth, start = 1750, frequency = 1)  # 这一步让横坐标变成真实年份！
# 预测未来 5 年（1850-1854）
fore <- forecast(ar1_model, h=5)
ar1_model <- Arima(birth_ts, order = c(1,0,0))
# 画预测图
plot(fore, 
     main="1750-1849 出生率及 1850-1854 预测", 
     col="purple", 
     lwd=2,
     xlab="年份",
     ylab="出生率")
grid()  # 加网格h_rates_final)
